steps.description: Click inside the "Message Copilot" text input box in the M365 Copilot chat interface under the "vscuse_app_wXEfTdev" agent.

parameters.text: show repair records assigned to karin blair

steps.description: Type "show repair records assigned to karin blair" into the chat input box at the bottom of the "vscuse_app_wXEfTdev" conversation in the M365 Copilot web interface.
Press the Enter key in the chat input box of the "M365 Copilot" web app after typing "Show repair records assigned to Karin Blair".
@assertion a button exists to allow action.
Click the "Always allow" button in the permission prompt of the M365 Copilot chat interface to authorize for ongoing access and processing of repair records.
Click the  button in the M365 Copilot chat interface to initiate login and proceed with the query.
@assertion get ai send back message include "Oil Change"
